title: Is selectable diagnostic message for $finish supported?
body:
Is selectable diagnostic message verbosity for `$finish(<val>)`/`$fatal(<val>, ...)` supported? The IEEE 1800-2012 standard shows the following table for the `<val>` argument:

```
0 Prints nothing
1 Prints simulation time and location
2 Prints simulation time, location, and statistics about the mem
```

No matter what number I use, the simulation always prints `- tb/tb.sv:79: Verilog $finish` at the end (using `$finish`).

My Verilator version is `Verilator 4.038 2020-07-11 rev v4.036-114-g0cd4a57ad`
